mapper.select: /* selectIfsalsq */ SELECT FN_IF_IFSALSQ() as ifsalsq FROM DUAL

SELECT IA.COMPKEY , IA.IFSALSQ , IA.plant , IA.line , IA.itemcate , IA.palletNo , DATE_FORMAT(IA.createDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createDateTime , IA.printDateTime , IA.seq , IA.alc , IA.carType , IA.goodsCode , IA.goodsName , IA.bodyNo , DATE_FORMAT(IA.receiveDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') AS receiveDateTime , IA.checkDateTime , IA.UPDTCHK , IA.IFPRSTS FROM IFSAL21R IA INNER JOIN ( SELECT COMPKEY, itemcate, plant, line, DATE_FORMAT(receiveDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') AS receiveDateTime, MAX(seq) AS seq FROM IFSAL21R
AND COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND checkDateTime = '' AND DATE_FORMAT(receiveDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') AND IFPRSTS = 'N'
GROUP BY itemcate, plant, line, DATE_FORMAT(receiveDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') ) IR ON IA.COMPKEY = IR.COMPKEY AND IA.itemcate = IR.itemcate AND IA.plant = IR.plant AND IA.line = IR.line AND DATE_FORMAT(IA.receiveDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(IR.receiveDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') AND IA.seq = IR.seq
